findings.description: The candidate rule extraction is completely empty, missing all mandatory gradient specifications, usage scopes, and direction constraints declared in the source units.

payload.value: Only use the 6 approved gradient specifications (Brand Blue to Dark Navy, Sky Blue to Deep Blue, Sunshine to 75% Gold, Golden Sand to White to Light Blue, Golden Sand to 75% Gold to Sunshine, and Sunshine to Light Gold). Gradients must run horizontally from left to right (dark/saturated to light) in masthead applications, and the logo mark must sit at the lightest end of the Sunshine to Light Gold gradient.
